emotional_tone: Authority, clarity, functional beauty, objective, trustworthy

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment, left-align dense content. Override default stretch with align-items: start.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. Hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-lg), border color darkens.
surfaces_and_borders.radius: rounded-none or max 4px (rounded-sm) for a sharp, rigid, functional feel.
surfaces_and_borders.headers: Solid Background with a hard bottom border.

components_strategy.navigation: Tenant workspace switcher (top nav). Sidebar or top-nav with clear hierarchy.
components_strategy.buttons: Sharp edges, solid primary color for main CTA, monochrome outlines for secondary.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. e.g. hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based format (e.g., data-testid='login-form-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. Contrast minimum 4.5:1 for normal text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts
Use Chivo for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body. Configure them in index.html via Google Fonts.
Use Shadcn UI extensively but override rounded borders to rounded-sm or rounded-none for the Swiss Brutalist look.
Build a grid-heavy dense dashboard ('Control Room' layout).
Use monochrome mostly (stark white, greys, blacks) with Klein Blue (#002FA7) strictly for primary actions, Warning Yellow for pending, Red for negative sentiment.
Implement Facebook OAuth login screen with the provided abstract background.
Ensure the workspace switcher is in the top nav and uses Shadcn Select or DropdownMenu.
